creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
After a longer period if testing, I think this should not be added to the ports tree. The plugin regularly stops working after some time and upstream is dead, so this will probably never be fixed.

I looked at matrix-ircd, which seems to be a more mature way to connect your IRC client to the matrix. At least it didn't stop working in the few day I tested it and, more importantly, the upstream is alive.

Therefore I will close this PR and submit a new port for matrix-irc in a few days.

If anyone interested in this Port, feel free to use the attached port, but change the MAINTAINER.
